summary: First iteration. Backend: 11/11 pytest cases passed (auth, students CRUD with ownership, predict + AI insight via Claude Sonnet 4.5, predict-quick, dashboard, CSV export/import). Frontend: login, dashboard render, students list, add-student modal, quick predict form, import/export pages all load correctly. No critical issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event - migrate to lifespan handlers (non-blocking).
CORS uses allow_origin_regex='.*' with allow_credentials=True; works in browsers but consider explicit origins for production.
Internet Access / Has Tutor inputs in Quick Predict are read-only text inputs ('Yes'/'No') instead of toggles - users cannot change them in the UI.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed students via backend tests; one UI student 'Tanish' was created during initial UI exploration.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all endpoints incl. AI prediction (~10s). Re-login URL stays at '/' but renders dashboard content. Add-student modal uses 'Save student' button. Internet/Tutor fields on Quick Predict are inputs not toggles — confirm intent with main agent.
